name: io.github.molpha/mcp
title: Molpha MCP
description: MCP server that lets AI agents create, fetch, verify, and publish Molpha oracle data.

environmentVariables.name: SIGNER_BACKEND
environmentVariables.description: Signing backend: memory (local keypair) or keychain (Privy / Turnkey).

environmentVariables.name: OWNER_KEYPAIR
environmentVariables.description: Path to a Solana JSON keypair file. Required when SIGNER_BACKEND=memory.

environmentVariables.name: KEYCHAIN_BACKEND
environmentVariables.description: Keychain provider: privy or turnkey. Required when SIGNER_BACKEND=keychain.

environmentVariables.name: PRIVY_APP_ID
environmentVariables.description: Privy app ID. Required for KEYCHAIN_BACKEND=privy.

environmentVariables.name: PRIVY_APP_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Privy app secret. Required for KEYCHAIN_BACKEND=privy.

environmentVariables.name: PRIVY_WALLET_ID
environmentVariables.description: Privy wallet ID. Required for KEYCHAIN_BACKEND=privy.

environmentVariables.name: PRIVY_WALLET_ADDRESS
environmentVariables.description: Solana address for the Privy wallet.

environmentVariables.name: TURNKEY_API_PUBLIC_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Turnkey API public key. Required for KEYCHAIN_BACKEND=turnkey.

environmentVariables.name: TURNKEY_API_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Turnkey API private key. Required for KEYCHAIN_BACKEND=turnkey.

environmentVariables.name: TURNKEY_ORGANIZATION_ID
environmentVariables.description: Turnkey organization ID. Required for KEYCHAIN_BACKEND=turnkey.

environmentVariables.name: TURNKEY_WALLET_ADDRESS
environmentVariables.description: Solana address for the Turnkey wallet.

environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_RPC
environmentVariables.description: Solana RPC endpoint.

environmentVariables.name: GATEWAY_ENDPOINTS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated Molpha gateway URLs. Leave empty to use the SDK default.

environmentVariables.name: MOLPHA_EVM_NETWORKS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated EVM verifier networks.

environmentVariables.name: MOLPHA_STARKNET_NETWORKS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated Starknet verifier networks.

environmentVariables.name: MOLPHA_DRY_RUN
environmentVariables.description: Preview all write and spend operations without submitting them.

environmentVariables.name: MOLPHA_MAX_EXECUTES_PER_DAY
environmentVariables.description: Process-local daily Solana submit cap.

environmentVariables.name: MOLPHA_X402_MAX_PRICE_USDC
environmentVariables.description: Refuse to fund an x402 round priced above this amount (decimal USDC).

environmentVariables.name: MOLPHA_X402_MAX_SPEND_PER_DAY_USDC
environmentVariables.description: Process-local daily x402 spend cap (decimal USDC).

environmentVariables.name: MOLPHA_X402_GATEWAY_PDA
environmentVariables.description: Optional settling gateway PDA (base58) to skip discovery when the escrow is already funded.
